question.title: difference between org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationHttpRequest and org.apache.catalina.connector.RequestFacade
question.body:
I am confused with org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationHttpRequest and org.apache.catalina.connector.RequestFacade

I was deploying my java application with tomcat 5 by specifying catalina jar in my pom. Now, I'm using tomcat 7 and I deleted the catalina jar from the pom. But, my request is always initialized with org.apache.catalina.connector.RequestFacade instead of others.

I cleaned the project and server many times, but the same thing happens.

Do you any idea about this problem ?
